report.title: Review report: {case_title}
report.scope_disclaimer: This is a working analytical report. It does not determine whether a person is lying.
report.indicators_disclaimer: Indicators describe the interview material and process. They are not automated legal, procedural, guilt, or deception decisions.
finding.missing_topic.title: Missing topic: {topic_label}
finding.missing_topic.detail: Topic was not covered by any question or answer.
finding.question_neutrality.title: Question may require neutral rewrite
finding.potential_inconsistency.title: Potential inconsistency: {attribute}
finding.potential_inconsistency.detail: Different values were recorded for the same narrative element: {values}. This requires clarification, not a truthfulness verdict.
indicator.indicator-topic-coverage.label: Topic coverage
factor.factor-covered-topics.label: Covered topics
factor.factor-missing-topics.label: Missing topics
factor.factor-total-questions.label: Total questions
factor.factor-flagged-questions.label: Flagged questions
factor.factor-answer-count.label: Recorded answers
factor.factor-conflict-count.label: Potential conflicts
factor.factor-source-topics.label: Source topics covered
factor.factor-source-claims.label: Source claims
